global_prompt_prefix: Vertical 9:16 cinematic character design sheet, 941x1672 style ratio, grounded eastern epic fantasy, realistic fabric texture, restrained low-magic, neutral dark studio backdrop, multiple views on one sheet, no readable text labels, no modern objects, no neon, no xianxia glamour.
global_negative_prompt: ragged beggar clothing, shredded hems, dangling torn strips, identical generic refugee outfits, modern clothing, polished heroic armor for civilians, overpowered magic, full angel wings, separated side-by-side sun and moon icons, plain black sun without abstract white-wing coverage, literal realistic insect wing flag, cartoon style, game UI text, watermark

zhaoming.rule: moon-white crescent must sit inside a worn golden sun wheel as one fused badge

suming.rule: abstract white wings cover a black sun with cold halo; old moon mark erased

prompts.purpose: refine protagonist hunter costume and v3 Zhaoming token integration
prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang, clearly 17-year-old common hunter and old relay guide, youthful sharp face, sword-like eyebrows, clear guarded eyes, lean wiry body. Clothing is poor but intact: gray-brown coarse hemp hunter short layers, reinforced shoulder and elbow patches, stitched repairs, leather wrist guards, practical short boots, quiver strap, trap cord, route pouch, no shredded hems, no beggar rags. Include hunter bow and short knife. Show a close-up inset of the half broken old relay token naturally built into the sheet: worn bronze and old white stone, one fused Zhaoming Sun-Moon emblem with moon-white crescent inside worn golden sun wheel, broken across the seal, not separate sun and moon. Include subtle left shoulder injury and faint gold-red residual marks only at eye corner or shoulder blade. Front, side, three-quarter, full-body and prop close-up, same identity across views.

prompts.purpose: preserve recommended identity while naturally integrating v3 Zhaoming inner pattern
prompts.prompt: Yan Nanzhi, 18-year-old female exiled royal princess, calm high-cold royal composure, slim figure, upright court-trained posture. Clothing is coarse cloth but clean, orderly, intact and restrained: plain dark travel outer robe with neat patches and dust, no rags, no holes, no shredded hem. Beneath it, show controlled glimpses of structured old-imperial female dress inspired by Zhou-Qin silhouettes, with fine v3 Zhaoming fused Sun-Moon patterned inner edge: moon-white crescent inside worn golden sun wheel, subtle and worn, not bright palace regalia. Black hair tied with southern red cord, moon-white jade piece, oil-paper blood treaty fragments. Front, side, three-quarter, full-body, face close-up and inner-edge/detail close-up, unmistakably female, royal bearing in exile without crown.

prompts.purpose: keep v01 insectoid Qingming inspector design and only correct the v3 Sumin insignia
prompts.prompt: Bai Yi, Sumin insectoid Qingming register inspector, based on the v01 design direction: tall still vertical silhouette, spotless white official robe, translucent wing-membrane shoulder mantle, integrated pale chitin faceplate, large dark compound-eye structures, dark neck membrane, slightly jointed or carapace-like fingers. He is not a human wearing a mask; do not show human hair, human face, or ordinary masked-human styling. Keep the cold controlled bureaucratic menace and clean ritual stillness. Correct the insignia naturally on robe, register, and detail close-up: abstract white wings covering a black sun disk with cold white or dark-gray halo, old moon trace erased, not a plain black sun and not literal insect wings. Include insect-wax needle, Qingming white register, clean cloth for wiping needle, thin white incense trace. Insectoid official, not full beast monster, no black armor. Front, side, back, inspection pose, face/compound-eye close-up, wing-membrane close-up and v3 insignia/detail close-up.

prompts.purpose: replace ragged child clothing with distinct village child and Qingming identifier states
prompts.prompt: Shen Zhaomian child character sheet with two states. Village state: sensitive child face, simple tied hair and burned hair cord, intact patched child short jacket, small apron or tied overskirt for medicine-house helping, small herb pouch, simple cloth shoes, poor and dusty but not ragged, no shredded skirt. Qingming identifier state: clean white child robe, insect-wax wrist ring, restrained v3 Sumin identifier mark with abstract white wings over haloed black sun, childhood herb pouch or burned hair cord retained as anchor. Institutional trauma, not villain glamour. Show front and side for both states, plus herb pouch, burned hair cord and wrist ring close-ups.

prompts.purpose: differentiate wallfoot mixed-heritage clothing from generic poor refugee clothing
prompts.prompt: Lu Qingli, teenage wallfoot mixed-heritage girl, compact fast survivor, wary half-smile, always ready to move near walls. Clothing is distinct wallfoot market survival wear: intact gray-blue short jacket, patched underlayers, rope belt, hidden pocket seams, black-market utility loops, kiln-dust cuffs, shard pottery charm, dark wood pass, narrow hidden knife. Poor, dusty and repaired but not ragged, not shredded, not a hunter outfit. Subtle insect-scale trace behind ear only visible in close-up, no decorative fantasy beast features. Front, side, back, action crouch with knife, ear-scale close-up and charm/pass close-up.

prompts.purpose: refine border-wall old soldier clothing and replace wrong emblem with v3 Zhaoming cloth strip
prompts.prompt: Xue Linqiang, older border-wall master and Gray Wall Army realist, broad worn old soldier posture, wind-burned face, frost-cracked fingers. Clothing is border military household gear: intact patched padded undercoat, gray-stone old armor plates, coarse wall cloth scarf, repaired cold-weather layers, old iron fasteners, snow wraps, practical boots, field-repaired but not ragged and not clean imperial officer. Include bone whistle, worn long spear, old wall belt. The reversed cloth strip at waist must use the v3 Zhaoming fused Sun-Moon emblem on its hidden side: moon-white crescent inside worn golden sun wheel, shown as an old reversed relic cloth, not black sun, not plain sun wheel. Front, side, back, wall guard pose, bone whistle close-up and reversed cloth strip close-up.

prompts.purpose: single board proving P1 human clothing roles are visually distinct
prompts.prompt: P1 costume role differentiation board for Severed Homeland, six full-body simplified costume references on one vertical sheet, no text labels. Show distinct silhouettes and accessories: common hunter boy with gray-brown short layers, bow, leather wrist guards, trap cord and route pouch; exiled royal princess in clean coarse dark travel robe with subtle old imperial inner edge and red hair cord; Qingming inspector in spotless white official robe with abstract white-wing-over-haloed-black-sun insignia, needle and register; village child in intact patched short jacket, small apron and herb pouch; wallfoot mixed-heritage girl in gray-blue short jacket, hidden pockets, wood pass, pottery charm and narrow knife; border old soldier in padded undercoat, old armor plates, bone whistle, spear, snow wraps and reversed old Sun-Moon cloth. All poor/common clothes may be patched and dusty but not ragged or shredded. The six costumes must be distinguishable by profession at a glance.

blocked.reason: Ready for built-in image generation or Codex background thread generation.
